description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:1.20.0 Docker image and runs rustc --version and cargo --version in a before_script. Define a single build stage and add four jobs: build:all-features, build:default, build:experimental, and build:function_prototypes. Each job runs cargo build --verbose --jobs 1 --release, with build:all-features adding the --all-features flag, build:experimental adding --features experimental, and build:function_prototypes adding --features function_prototypes, while build:default runs without extra feature flags. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, or special rules, and all jobs execute in the build stage.
